channel.title: Journal of Polymer Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Polymer Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Magnetic metal oxide assisted conducting polymer nanocomposites as eco-friendly electrode materials for supercapacitor applications: a review
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0101

item.title: Effects of different ratios of soft and rigid segment on the properties of soil and sand fixing materials of polyacrylate
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0074

item.title: Research on the impact of active calcium carbonate on the performance of degradable composite films
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0169

item.title: Research and functionalization of konjac glucomannan and its hydrogel in wound dressing
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0132

item.title: Acryloyl starch/carboxymethyl cellulose grafting copolymerization composite hydrogel for efficient adsorption of methylene blue
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0120

item.title: Preparation and anti-fouling behavior of conductive and hydrophilic polypyrrole modified PVDF composite membrane
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0153

item.title: Gas assisted fused deposition modeling: effects of assist gas parameters on print quality and properties
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0126

item.title: Remediation of Ni2+ and Sr2+ ions from aqueous solutions by acacia gum/polyacrylic acid hydrogel reinforced with TiO2 nanoparticles
item.description: Article by Sabah F. Sherbiny, Ebtissam A. Saad, Mohamed Abdel Geleel, Nagwa A. Badawy, Shaimaa M. Nasef DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/polyeng-2024-0152
